name: Aviso AI Revenue Intelligence API
what_it_does: AI-powered revenue intelligence and forecasting platform with REST API — providing ML-based sales forecasting, deal risk scoring, conversational intelligence from calls and emails, pipeline health analysis, and coaching recommendations to improve sales rep performance and forecast accuracy.
use_cases: Querying AI forecast data and deal risk scores for executive revenue reporting
Pulling deal health indicators for sales manager pipeline review automation
Integrating Aviso coaching recommendations with sales rep workflows and LMS
Monitoring win probability changes for timely deal intervention alerts
Syncing Aviso forecast data with FP&A systems for revenue planning
not_for: Sales engagement and outbound sequencing (use Salesloft or Outreach)
CRM data entry and management (use Salesforce or HubSpot directly)
best_when: An enterprise sales organization wants AI-powered forecasting with high accuracy, deal coaching recommendations from conversation analysis, and pipeline health insights for managers.
avoid_when: You need outbound sales engagement automation, marketing intelligence, or a simpler forecast tool without AI coaching (use Clari for simpler revenue operations).

auth.notes: API token from Aviso account. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access. Webhook for forecast updates and deal alert events. No OAuth2. CRM integration (Salesforce, HubSpot) via separate OAuth flow. Conversational intelligence via call recording integrations.

pricing.notes: Redwood City, CA-based company. Founded 2012. Raised $47M+. AI-first approach to revenue intelligence. WinScore™ proprietary deal scoring model. Conversational intelligence from email, calls, and meetings. Time-series ML forecasting unique differentiator. Strong in technology and financial services verticals.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for forecasts, deals, pipeline, and coaching. Bearer token auth. Limited public documentation — enterprise integration focused. CRM connection required before deal data is meaningful. ML forecasts are point-in-time — query frequently for current state. Conversational intelligence requires call recording integrations.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Forecast reads fully idempotent by period. Deal reads idempotent by deal ID. Pipeline reads idempotent. Coaching reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: CRM integration required before deal and forecast data is queryable
ML forecasts are updated periodically — not real-time; check update frequency
Conversational intelligence requires Gong, Chorus, or Zoom recording integration
Enterprise contract required — API not self-serve
WinScore calculation is proprietary — black box scoring, not fully explainable

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. Revenue forecast data is highly sensitive business intelligence. CRM and conversation data integration creates broad data access — evaluate trust model carefully.
